revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23455888809|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Humor here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{small|}}} |{{#if: {{{demo|}}} || {{Top icon | image = Ambox humor.svg | wikilink = WP:JOKE | description = {{{text|This page contains '''material that is kept because it is considered [[Wikipedia:Humor|humorous]]'''. Such material is not meant to be taken seriously.}}} | id = humor-icon }}}} |{{ombox | class = ombox-humor | image = [[File:Ambox humor.svg|60x40px|alt=|link=]] | style = text-align:center; | text = {{{text|This {{#ifeq:{{{section|}}}|yes|section|page}} contains '''material that is kept because it is considered [[Wikipedia:Humor|humorous]]'''.
Such material is not meant to be taken seriously.}}} | imageright = {{#if:{{{1|}}} | {{Ombox/shortcut|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}|{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}} }} }} }}}}{{Category handler |nocat={{{nocat|false}}} |main={{talk other||{{error|Misplaced {{tnull|Humor}}}}}} |template={{Sandbox other|||{{PAGENAME}}]]}} |}}{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Wikipedia humor templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia humor|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{small|}}} |{{#if: {{{demo|}}} || {{Top icon | image = Ambox humor.svg | wikilink = WP:JOKE | description = {{{text|This page contains '''material that is kept because it is considered [[Wikipedia:Humor|humorous]]'''. Such material is not meant to be taken seriously.}}} | id = humor-icon }}}} |{{ombox | class = ombox-humor | image = [[File:Ambox humor.svg|60x40px|alt=|link=]] | style = text-align:center; | text = {{{text|This {{#ifeq:{{{section|}}}|yes|section|page}} contains '''material that is kept because it is considered [[Wikipedia:Humor|humorous]]'''.
Such material is not meant to be taken seriously.}}} | imageright = {{#if:{{{1|}}} | {{Ombox/shortcut|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}|{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}} }} }} }}}}{{Category handler |nocat={{{nocat|false}}} |main={{talk other||{{error|Misplaced {{tnull|Humor}}}}}} |template={{Sandbox other|||{{PAGENAME}}]]}} |}}{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Wikipedia humor templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia humor|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
